## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does.

## Related Issue

Link any related issues: `Closes #123`, `Refs #456`.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] I have added or updated unit tests for my changes
- [ ] My changes are backward-compatible
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `## [Unreleased]` section
- [ ] I have updated docs (README, `docs/`) if my change affects the public API or UX

## Testing

Describe the testing you performed. If you ran the manual smoke test, note which steps you verified.

## Screenshots

If your PR includes UI changes, attach before/after screenshots.
